feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /news/ News: The USA Loses Iran War: 14 point MOU Released
entry.content: https://www.reuters.com/world/middl e-east/14-point-draft-us-iran-deal- 2026-06-17/ >1. The United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran and their allies in the current war, by signing this MOU (Memorandum of Understanding), declare the immediate and permanent termination of military operations on all fronts, including in Lebanon, and undertake from now on not to initiate any war or any military operation against each other, and to refrain from the threat or use of force against eac

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Is having a nosy neighbor a real thing?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >War of the Worlds was released on Amazon Prime Video on July 30, 2025. The film…
entry.content: >War of the Worlds was released on Amazon Prime Video on July 30, 2025. What's the real reason "critics" hated it?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why no "extended range translator keyboard"
entry.content: have you noticed how there exist no huge keyboard with added 25 or so, keys here is my concept: >contains all keys in fullsize US keyboard >has additional set of keys (maybe 25 extra?) for non-US languages that use different symbols from LÄTIN >these languages: either Japanese symbols, or Korean, or Russian, or Greek, one of those languages in addition to US >Windows drivers would instantly pick it up, if you hit Russian key, a Russian symbol comes out, if you hit American key, LÄTIN comes out a

entry.title: /o/ Auto: let’s have the ultimate debate bros facebook marketplace vs craigslist for buyin…
entry.content: let’s have the ultimate debate bros facebook marketplace vs craigslist for buying a used car facebook: free listings, tons of options, but you gotta deal with absolute retarded buyers and sellers, flakes, “is this still available” spam, and people who think their clapped out civic is worth 10k craigslist: way smaller selection these days, but at least people are (sometimes) more serious. downside is higher prices from delusional boomers who think it’s still 2008 which one actually wins in 2026?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I'm considering installing a subwoofer in a 2001 Volvo S60 Sedan with the factor…
entry.content: I'm considering installing a subwoofer in a 2001 Volvo S60 Sedan with the factory stereo (HU-605, the basic audio system without a separate amplifier). I've never used a line output converter or taken a subwoofer signal from the rear speakers before. My plan is to use a line output converter and tap the signal directly from the rear parcel shelf speakers to the subwoofer amplifier, but a few questions came to mind: 1) If I tap the speaker signal for the line output converter, can the parcel shel

entry.title: /int/ International: A few days ago, I said to a Pole that 50% of my bookshelf is made up of Russian …
entry.content: A few days ago, I said to a Pole that 50% of my bookshelf is made up of Russian books, and I only have one Polish book (one of Sapkowskis, of course). This is a thread where people bordering Russia or under ex-Soviet influence can post some of their good literature that was translated to English, because I assume people who hate Russia so much on the claims that they are uncivilised have greater books or music than them and maybe, who knows, my bookshelf will be filled with a metric ton of Polis

entry.content: >Kaspersky discovered a malware campaign targeting Steam users through infected wallpaper >the wallpaper deployed the DarkKomet backdoor and installed a modified library designed to target Steam users: it harvested account information and hijacked active Steam sessions. https://www.kaspersky.co.uk/about/p ress-releases/kaspersky-discovered- a-malware-campaign-targeting-steam- users-through-infected-wallpaper weeb sisters??

entry.title: /g/ Technology: 1 - So GLM 5.2 is 700b parameters (ish) 2 - 4x DGX Sparks can supposedly handle …
entry.content: 1 - So GLM 5.2 is 700b parameters (ish) 2 - 4x DGX Sparks can supposedly handle up to 700b parameters (give or take) 3 - GLM 5.2 is supposedly in striking distance of the performance of GPT 5.5 and Opus 4.8. In my brief tests, it's really not shabby at all. 4 - So for $20k, you can get near the frontier on your table. 5 - Extrapolate the trend, and you could have mythos/5.5 pro - class models in your dining room for the cost of a cheap car less than five years from now. Even without extrapolatio

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I guess I solved the LCD panel dilemma
entry.content: People are divided between OLED and LCD/MINILED etc. (Microled is still way too expensive) One of the main disadvantages of MINILEDs is that there isn't enough resolution of the backlight. The best minileds have around 15000 minileds, which translates into around 163 x 92 pixels. Which are the sony true rgb TVs. But what if someone combined IPS with OLED??? IPS as the front panel and OLED as backlight? All manufacturers have to do is create an OLED panel with DVD like resolution (720×405 pixels)

entry.title: /mu/ Music: 2016 was a great year for music
entry.content: to celebrate 10 years since 2016, post your favourite albums from that year. I'll start: 1. Young Thug - JEFFERY 2. Touché Amoré - Stage Four 3. Lil Peep - Hellboy 4. Lil Peep - Crybaby 5. DIIV - Is the Is Are 6. Young Thug - Slime Season 3 7. Jesu & Sun Kil Moon - Jesu / Sun Kil Moon 8. Bladee - Eversince 9. Wicca Phase Springs Eternal - Secret Boy 10. Young Thug - I'm Up

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8383 Cambrian Era Porn Edition Previous Thread: >>83501755 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their

Fantasize, discuss, ERP with, or post NSFW of your favorite corpo or indie vtubers!
